name: SOCKET MOBILE, INC.
business: Socket Mobile, Inc. provides data capture and delivery solutions for workforce mobilization. Its primary products are cordless data capture devices incorporating barcode scanning and RFID/NFC technologies that connect via Bluetooth. These products are used in mobile applications across various industries including point of sale, commercial services, asset tracking, manufacturing, transportation, event management, medical, and education.
sellsTo: transportation and logistics (goods tracking and movement)
event management (ticketing, entry, access control, and identification)

exposures.sentence: We offer a full range of cordless barcode scanners designed to connect to smartphones, tablets, and other computing devices via Bluetooth.
We offer two camera-based barcode scanning products: the C820, a free and easily integrated camera scanning solution, and the C860, an upgraded and advanced scanning solution.
We offer products that are certified by Apple Pay Value Added Service (VAS), Google Wallet Smart Tap, NFC Forum, FeliCa, and Bluetooth SIG.
Our revenues are primarily driven by sales of barcode scanners integrated into mPOS (mobile Point of Sale) applications used with Apple tablets and other mobile devices.
We provide a combo NFC & QR code mobile wallet reader, which combines NFC contactless technology with Bluetooth barcode scanning data capture.
Designed for rugged work environments, DuraScan data readers offer exceptional durability, making them ideal for industries such as warehousing, manufacturing, and distribution.
Our products are incorporated into mobile applications used in ... transportation and logistics (goods tracking and movement).
Our products are incorporated into mobile applications used in ... medical and education.
Our products are incorporated into mobile applications used in ... manufacturing process and quality control.
Our products are incorporated into mobile applications used in ... event management (ticketing, entry, access control, and identification).
Our DuraScan family includes ... the Wearable 900 Series (DW930, DW940).
The Bring Your Own Device (BYOD) market is a significant yet underserved segment where we see strong growth potential.
